      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teem par stipru Likkunu
estahdidams/ ka teem bij to zet-
ortupadesmitu un peektupades-
iitu Deenu ta Mehnes Adar
gaddus fwinneht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to Deeno Pucku/
urâs tee Judi bij Meernu dab-
ujfchi no jaweem Eenaidnee-
eem/ un pehz to Mehnefi/ kas
vinno Noskumschanu par Pree-
u/ un winno Behdas par lab-
ahm Deenahu bij darrijs/ ka
ee tahs darritu par Dsihru un
ihgsinibas Deenahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Judi peezeisme/ ko
ee bij fahkuschi darribt/ un ko
Mardakajus us teem bij rakstijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka Amans/ Me-
atus Dehlê/ tas Agagiteris
visfu Judu Eenaidneeks prett
eem Judeem bij dohmajs tohs
sdeldcht/ un ka winsch meflojs
ohs beedinaht un nomaitaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad (Estere) preekfch
a Kehnixa nahze/ irr winsch zur
Brahmatahn pawehlejs/ka win-
a niknas Dohmas/ ko winsch
ahr teem Judeein bij nodohmajs/
is winna Galwu atgreestohs/
n tee irr winnu ar jaweem
Dehleem pee Kohka pakahrnfchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht fauze tee Schahs
Deenas Burim/ no tahs Mefle-
chanas Wahrda/tadeht/(proh-
ti) wiſſu Wahrdu deht/ kas
eekch tahs Grahimatas/ un ko
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "To eezehle tee Judi/ un
nolikfe to preekich feewin un fa-
weem Behrneem/ un wiﬀeem ta-
weem Behznahkaneem/ ka tas
ne taptu pahrkahpts/ ka teem
bij fawas diwi Deenas fwinneht/
pehz winnu usrakstitu Sihni/
un pehz winno nospreestu Laiku
igaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka schihs Deenas taptu
peeminnetas un turretas wiﬀa

mê/ ikweena Walstâ/ un ikweena
Pilsfahâ/ un ka tahs Deenas
Burim ne bij pahrkahpt to Judu
Starpâ/ un ka winnu Peemin-
neschana ne taptu aismirsta pee
winnu Behrnu Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to rakstijs ta Keh-

un darbojahs fcho Grahmatn no
teem Purim ohtrâ Reise apstip-
rinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winsch fuhtijs Grah-
matas/ us wiﬀeem Judeem wi-

nâs Walstibâs/ ta Kehnixa Wal-
stibas Nâswerufa/ ar meerigeem
un ustizigeem Waherdeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka teem bij schihs Dee-

un ta Kehnixinne Estere teem bij

ns fawn Dwehfeli un us fawn
